summary: Frontend review completed for PR #37 (bug fix for issue #36). Verified: Notification.tsx now uses robust .includes('error') detection instead of fragile startsWith logic. All required test cases present: T-FE-SHARE-001-03 (Import error) and T-FE-PERS-001-04 (Storage limit exceeded). Accessibility attributes (role=status, aria-live=polite) confirmed. Code quality: clean, well-tested, no issues. Review verdict: READY TO MERGE. PR is ready for human approval at gate-6b-feature-pr.

artifacts.summary: All requirements met. Error detection fixed, comprehensive tests added, accessibility preserved.

recommended_actions: After approval, merge PR #37 to main
